sections.paragraph: ἀπαρχή, ῆς, ἡ [ἀπάρχομαι (ἀπό, ἀρχή) ‘make a beginning in sacrifice’, by offering someth. as first fruits] cultic t.t., of first portions set apart for deity first fruits Ro 11:16 (see Numbers 15:18-21); by extension, of pers. 1 Cor 15:20; 16:15 (= first converts); 2 Th 2:13 (but see ἀρχή); Js 1:18; Rv 14:4; of the spirit Ro 8:23 (unless ἀπαρχή here is to be understood in the sense of birth certificate / document for identification).
